name: TradeSanta
description_short: User-friendly crypto trading bot with DCA and Grid strategies, simple setup templates, and support for major exchanges.
description_long:
TradeSanta is a cloud-based crypto trading bot platform that emphasizes simplicity and ease of use. The platform offers pre-built bot templates that new users can deploy in minutes, making automated crypto trading accessible even to those with no programming or technical analysis experience.

The bot supports two main strategies: DCA (Dollar-Cost Averaging) for accumulation during downtrends, and Grid for profiting from sideways markets. Users can customize parameters including order size, price deviation, take-profit targets, and technical indicator triggers (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands).

TradeSanta connects to major exchanges including Binance, Coinbase, Kraken, Huobi, and OKX. Plans range from a free tier with 2 bots to the Maximum plan at $49/month with unlimited bots. The cloud-based architecture means bots run 24/7 without needing your computer to be on.
pros: Very easy setup with pre-built templates
cons: Limited strategy options (DCA and Grid only)
meta_description: User-friendly crypto trading bot with DCA and Grid strategies, simple setup templates, and support for major exchanges.
